quickie-kajmak.name: Quickie Kajmak
instructions: Press feta cheese through a sieve until most of the liquid has drained.
Transfer feta to a mixing bowl. Add sour cream and cream cheese; beat with an electric mixer until smooth. Cover and refrigerate until flavors blend, at least 30 minutes.
Bring to room temperature before serving.

quince-and-apple-compote-lezzet.name: Quince And Apple Compote
instructions: 1. Peel the shell of the moon.
2. Get small balls with the help of a small parsing spoon.
3. Wait for the decision of the half-hour room temperature, especially for the months.
4. Then get small balls with a spoon that shines in the same way from apples.
5. Add water on fruits.
6. Add cinnamon, mulch and carnations.
7. Stop boiling.
8. After 10 minutes add sugar.
9. Shake for 15 minutes.
10. Take the moonva compression from the stove.
11. 11. Keep in the refrigerator after cooling in the room heat.
12. Serve cold.

quinoa-oatmeal-cookies.name: Quinoa Oatmeal Cookies
instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Spray a baking sheet with cooking spray.
Place 1 cup oats in a food processor; pulse 7 to 8 times. Add quinoa and pulse until finely chopped.

Transfer oat and quinoa mixture to a large bowl. Add remaining 1 cup oats, applesauce, eggs, sugar, vanilla extract, baking soda, and salt; mix well to combine. Fold chocolate chips and pecans into the batter.
Drop tablespoons of batter onto the baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until edges are golden, about 14 minutes. Let sit on the baking sheet for 1 to 2 minutes before moving to a wire rack to cool, about 25 minutes.
